CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, data String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'ClickHouse'), (3, 'CRC32'), (4, ''), (5, NULL);
SELECT CRC32(data) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CRC32(data) FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(data) > 0;
SELECT id, CRC32(data) AS checksum FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32);
SELECT t1.id, CRC32(t1.data) AS checksum FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table_2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t2.ref_id = 1;
SELECT t1.id, t2.ref_id, CRC32(t1.data || '_suffix') AS checksum FROM test_table t1 LEFT JOIN test_table_2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id;
SELECT t1.id, nested.checksum FROM (SELECT id, CRC32(data) AS checksum FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2)) AS nested JOIN test_table_2 t2 ON nested.id = t2.ref_id;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, CRC32(data) AS checksum FROM test_table GROUP BY data HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
